capability_objective: Show me the active orders at my saved fulfillment location. I’m checking the entry for “Boise Office Furniture Order” in particular. Use the stored preference instead of asking me to repeat it, and do not create or change any records.
prompt:
Show me the active orders at my saved fulfillment location. I’m checking the entry for “Boise Office Furniture Order” in particular. Use the stored preference instead of asking me to repeat it, and do not create or change any records.

Work only in this repository and use the genuine local commerce executable for all profile and order access; do not inspect or query its seed data or runtime directory directly. The executable is `python3 commerce_desk.py`, and its built-in help describes its commands. Retrieve the saved profile before using that returned fulfillment location to list the active orders. Do not ask me to supply a value that the saved profile provides. This is read-only: do not create, update, cancel, or otherwise change any commerce record, and do not substitute a name search for the requested active-order listing.

Write the result to `active-orders.md`. Its first nonblank line must be `Saved fulfillment location: <location>`, using the profile value exactly. Then include one Markdown bullet per order returned by the active-order listing, in the executable’s order, formatted `- <name> — <stable ID>`. Include no other nonblank lines and make no claims beyond the retrieved data. Run `python3 tests/verify_task.py` to verify the result.
